nonGoals: Do not change any other function in tags.ts
Do not modify SSML tag definitions themselves
Do not alter how tags are rendered or processed downstream
Do not add new SSML tags
objective: Make getTagDef() case-insensitive so SSML tag lookups work regardless of casing, and add tests for uppercase, mixed-case, and lowercase inputs
planText: In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts, modify getTagDef() to compare tagName.toLowerCase() against t.tag.toLowerCase(). In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts, add test cases for uppercase ('PROSODY'), mixed-case ('Break'), lowercase ('emphasis'), and a negative case ('nonexistent'). Run npm run test to verify all tests pass.
